context_translations.driver.menu.destructive_unload_driver_ob: R0 experimental destructive unload of DriverObject
Allow DriverObject neutralization; delete DeviceObjects only when DriverUnload is absent. Intended only for malicious drivers and may cause a blue screen.
context_translations.driver.confirm.destructive_unload.title: R0 experimental destructive unload
context_translations.driver.confirm.destructive_unload.body:
This operation bypasses the SCM/PnP lifecycle and lets R0 neutralize the target DriverObject. If DriverUnload is missing, it may also delete DeviceObjects and make the DriverObject temporary.

This can cause an immediate blue screen. Use it only when a malicious driver is confirmed and ordinary forced unload has failed.

Continue?

context_translations.driver.signature.report.boundary: Interpretation boundary: PE certificate-table structure does not establish certificate-chain trust; CI cached signing level is a separate kernel-cached result. This query did not call WinTrust. Loaded-module binding checks only the enumerated base address and file name; the certificate table still comes from the current on-disk file.

context_translations.driver.menu.deep_cleanup_by_base.tooltip: Remove verifiable callbacks only after DriverObject handling succeeds; this path carries a significant system-stability risk.
context_translations.driver.confirm.deep_cleanup.title: R0 deep cleanup
context_translations.driver.confirm.deep_cleanup.body:
This operation cleans the DriverObject by module base; only after DriverObject handling succeeds will it remove verifiable process, thread, image, Minifilter, and WFP callbacks.

It does not unlink PsLoadedModuleList, but the target driver may still destabilize the system while processing requests.

Continue?

context_translations.kernel.hooks.inline.detail:
Inline Hook details
Module: %1
Function: %2
Function address: %3
Hook type: %4
Target address: %5
Target module: %6
Status: %7
Module base: %8
Target module base: %9
Current memory bytes(%10): %11
R0 observed baseline(%12): %13
Disk baseline bytes(%14): %15
Difference status: %16
Disk path: %17
RVA: %18
Flags: 0x%19

Explanation: The current protocol field expectedBytes is derived from a memory observation in R0 and is normally a same-source snapshot as currentBytes; it does not represent original disk bytes. This page also has R3 read baseline bytes from the disk module file at the RVA relative to the module base and compare them with current memory bytes; when the disk baseline is unavailable, treat the R0 observed baseline only as a diagnostic snapshot, not as a clean baseline. The disk baseline is raw bytes at the same RVA in the file; relocations, hot patches, and vendor runtime rewrites are not normalized, so any difference still needs to be evaluated together with the Hook type and target address. Removal keeps the existing NOP flow and does not add automatic repair capability.

File: %3
Please enter WRITE to confirm:
source_translations.该操作会按模块基址清理 DriverObject；仅在 DriverObject:
This operation clears DriverObject by module base address. Only after successful DriverObject processing will it proceed to remove process/thread/PE/minifilter/WFP etc., verified callbacks.

PsLoadedModuleList is not unloaded, but if the target driver processes requests concurrently, system instability may occur.

Continue?
source_translations.该操作会直接写入 %1 @ %2，长度 %3 字节。\n请输入 WRITE 确认:
This operation writes directly to %1 @ %2, length %3 bytes. 
Please enter WRITE to confirm:
source_translations.该操作会绕过 SCM/PnP 生命周期，允许 R0 中和目标 DriverObj:
This operation bypasses SCM/PnP lifecycle, allowing R0 and target DriverObject; if the driver lacks DriverUnload, it attempts deletion of DeviceObject and temporaryizes DriverObject.

This may cause an immediate Blue Screen. Recommended only for confirming malicious drivers where standard forced uninstall fails.

Continue?
source_translations.该操作会通过 ArkDriverClient 调用 removeExternal: This operation calls removeExternalCallbackEx via the ArkDriverClient public API path; experimental unlink is not used. Continue?
source_translations.该操作可能导致设备暂时不可用，并可能要求重启。: This operation may temporarily disable the device and require a reboot.

source_translations.详情区：先显示快照，按需补充单 HWND runtime readiness/t: Detail pane: displays a snapshot first, supplementing with single HWND runtime readiness/tagWND diagnostics as needed.
source_translations.说明: IAT 检测比较 thunk 当前目标是否仍落在声明导入模块内；EAT: IAT detection compares the thunk target against declared import modules; EAT checks if export RVA falls within its own image or forwarded exports.
source_translations.说明: publicSymbols 可用于函数/模块归因；tagWND/tagT: publicSymbols aids function/module attribution; tagWND/tagTHREADINFO/tagQ/tagHOOK/tagHOTKEY fields still require a private PDB or verified profile for reading.
source_translations.说明: 主地址显示会优先显示真实回调函数；定位/诊断行没有真实回调函数时显示全局: Primary address display prioritizes the actual callback function; when no real callback exists, it shows global arrays, linked list nodes, identifiers, or diagnostic values.
source_translations.说明: 当前协议字段 expectedBytes 在 R0 中来自内存观察，通常: The expectedBytes field in current protocol is sourced via memory observation (typically a snapshot of currentBytes) and does not represent raw disk bytes.
source_translations.说明: 本结果仅聚合证据，不执行卸载、移除或修复。: This result aggregates evidence only; it performs no uninstall, removal, or repair actions.
source_translations.说明: 本页只展示 FilterManager 公开枚举接口与字段定义，不做卸载: This page displays FilterManager public enumeration interfaces and field definitions without performing any unloading, bypassing, or interception modifications.
source_translations.说明: 该节点为 UI 父目录占位，未直接绑定 Worker 返回记录。\n: This node is a UI parent directory placeholder; no Worker return record is directly bound here.
source_translations.说明: 详细窗口列表与桌面切换见“窗口管理”页；本页仅做只读审计，不做消息截获、: Detailed window lists and desktop switching are in the 'Window Management' page. This page performs read-only auditing only, with no message interception or input capture.
source_translations.说明: 这里只做只读对象/句柄视图，不提供解锁、删除或绕过动作。\n\n: This provides a read-only object/handle view; it does not offer unlock, delete, or bypass actions.
source_translations.说明: 选中的是子窗口，已对所属顶层窗口执行。\n: Selected is the child window; action executed on its parent top-level window.
source_translations.说明：DeviceObject 在此页以卷设备路径做只读侧写，不触碰内核对象本身: DeviceObject here performs read-only tracing via volume device path without touching kernel objects themselves.
source_translations.说明：SymbolicLink 本身不是可递归容器，本页只解析目标；若目标指向: SymbolicLink itself is not a recursive container; this page parses only the target. If targeting Directory, subsequent recursion handles it in the directory tab.
source_translations.说明：text diff 的磁盘对比由 R3 后续阶段完成，本页当前展示 R0: Disk comparison for text diff completes later via R3 stages; this page currently shows R0 memory hash/sample status.
source_translations.说明：命名管道属于 NPFS 文件系统目录枚举，本页使用 NtOpenFile: Named pipes belong to the NPFS filesystem directory enumeration; this page reads \Device\NamedPipe via NtOpenFile + NtQueryDirectoryFile.
source_translations.说明：测试模式并不会放行完全未签名的 x64 .sys；: Test mode does not allow completely unsigned x64 .sys files;
source_translations.说明：系统级 Hook 链表不提供官方通用枚举接口，当前页聚焦可稳定获取的消息上: System-level hook lists lack official generic enumeration interfaces; this page focuses on stably accessible message contexts.
source_translations.说明：该动作影响现有线程；目标后续新建线程不自动覆盖。错误线程偏移可能导致系统不: This action affects existing threads; newly created target threads are not automatically overwritten. Thread offset errors may cause system instability. Continue?
source_translations.说明：调试输出使用 DBWIN 机制。该机制主要捕获 OutputDebugSt: Debug output uses the DBWIN mechanism, primarily capturing OutputDebugString,

source_translations.\n结论边界：PE 证书表及 WIN_CERTIFICATE 记录属于磁盘结构证: Interpretation boundary: PE certificate-table and WIN_CERTIFICATE records are on-disk structural evidence and do not establish certificate-chain trust; CI cached signing level is a separate kernel-cached result. This page did not call WinTrust.
